description: Install framer-motion in shared-ui and create reusable animation primitive components (FadeIn, StaggerList, PageTransition, SpringButton, AnimatedSkeleton, SlidePanel, ScaleOnHover) that use the brand motion tokens from @quant/brand. These components wrap framer-motion's declarative API for React and serve as the animation foundation for the entire ecosystem.
steps: Add framer-motion@^11 as a dependency in packages/shared-ui/package.json and run pnpm install
Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/index.ts as the barrel export for all animation primitives

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/FadeIn.tsx - a wrapper using framer-motion's motion.div with fade + slide-up entrance animation. Props: direction (up/down/left/right), delay, duration, className, children. Use brand duration.normal and easing.easeOut. Respect prefers-reduced-motion via framer-motion's useReducedMotion hook.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/StaggerList.tsx - animates children with staggered entrances. Props: staggerDelay (default 0.05s), children, className. Uses AnimatePresence and motion.div with brand spring.gentle config.
Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/PageTransition.tsx - full-page entrance animation. Props: children, className. Fade + slight Y translate on mount using brand duration.moderate.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/SpringButton.tsx - button with spring scale on press (whileTap). Props: extends ButtonHTMLAttributes. Uses brand spring.snappy for the tap animation. Scale to 0.97 on press.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/AnimatedSkeleton.tsx - skeleton loading placeholder with shimmer effect using framer-motion's animate prop for a repeating gradient shift. Props: variant (text/circle/rect), width, height, className.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/SlidePanel.tsx - side panel that slides in/out with spring physics. Props: isOpen, side (left/right), width, onClose, children. Uses brand spring.stiff for snappy open/close.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/ScaleOnHover.tsx - wrapper that scales up subtly (1.02) on hover. Props: scale (default 1.02), children, className. Uses brand spring.snappy transition.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/MotionConfig.tsx - a context provider that reads prefers-reduced-motion and provides a shouldAnimate boolean to all motion components. Export a useMotionConfig hook.
Export all Motion components and their Props types from packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts under a '// Motion / Animation primitives' section
Run pnpm typecheck to confirm all 111 packages pass
Run pnpm build to confirm all 88 packages pass
acceptance_criteria: framer-motion is listed in packages/shared-ui/package.json dependencies
All 7 animation components plus MotionConfig exist in packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/
All components are exported from packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts
All components accept a className prop for style composition
All components check for prefers-reduced-motion and skip animation when enabled
findings: framer-motion@11.18.2 installed. SpringButton uses explicit prop interface instead of extending ButtonHTMLAttributes to avoid onDrag type conflicts with framer-motion's HTMLMotionProps. Pre-commit hook runs prettier on staged files. All 111/111 typecheck and 88/88 build pass. POST-REVIEW: Fixed 6 issues - LoadingState reduced-motion now shows static indicators, skeleton respects reduced-motion, StaggerList supports as/childAs props for semantic HTML, MotionProvider is consumed by all primitives via useMotionConfig(), animated prop added to all 4 state components, and use client directive added to all Motion files.
